## Summary

Describe the change in three buckets (write **None** when a bucket does not apply).

### Product / UX

<!-- User-visible behavior, copy, loading/error states, accessibility users would notice -->

### Architecture / ADR

<!-- ADR links, layering, data/auth/deployment/secrets boundaries; or None -->

### Alignment gaps

<!-- New/updated GAP-* in docs/adr-alignment-gaps.md (or path in adrs/GOVERNANCE.md); or None -->

## Test evidence

<!-- Required: commands run, spec paths, or manual steps -->

- **Commands run:**
- **Coverage notes:**
- **Untested risk:** <!-- Required if nothing was run; state what could break -->

## Merge-ready (architecture-touching changes only)

<!-- Delete this section for trivial / non-architectural PRs; state "Orchestration not required" when applicable -->

- [ ] ADR created/updated or documented follow-up
- [ ] Alignment gaps updated if deviating from Accepted ADRs ([docs/adr-alignment-gaps.md](docs/adr-alignment-gaps.md))
- [ ] Verified check/lint/test commands pass for touched paths (see README § Development)
- [ ] Orchestrated run: linked validation and test artifacts with explicit pass / pass-with-notes verdict

**Guide:** [docs/pr-and-commit-guide.md](docs/pr-and-commit-guide.md) · **Validation:** [docs/validation-checklist.md](docs/validation-checklist.md) when present
